_metadata.description: Character appearance seed data for Cobra faction ARAH vehicles

data.name: Cobra F.A.N.G. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Blue one-man attack gyrocopter with a single overhead rotor, open-frame cockpit, and side-mounted guns. Compact rotorcraft frequently deployed in swarms.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra H.I.S.S. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dark blue wedge-shaped tank with an elevated glass canopy cockpit, dual side-mounted cannons, and caterpillar treads. Cobra's signature armored assault vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra S.N.A.K.E. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue motorized one-man battle armor suit with articulated arms, leg treads, and a forward-mounted cannon. Enclosed pilot compartment in the torso section.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra A.S.P. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Blue motorized twin-cannon artillery platform on a rotating base with elevated dual barrels. Open single-operator emplacement with Cobra insignia.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra C.L.A.W. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Blue one-man armed hang glider with twin engines, nose-mounted guns, and a delta-wing frame. Lightweight covert aerial insertion vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra Rattler (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dark blue twin-engine ground attack jet loosely based on the A-10 Thunderbolt II with forward-mounted Gatling gun, under-wing bomb pylons, and a single-seat cockpit canopy.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra Stinger (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Black 4WD assault jeep — a modified VAMP repaint with Cobra markings, roll bar-mounted twin guns, and open-top design. Night operations vehicle with aggressive off-road tires.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra Water Moccasin (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Blue swamp-running attack airboat with a large rear-mounted fan propeller, forward machine guns, and low-profile hull. Designed for wetland assault operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra Bunker (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue static defensive bunker with pop-up gun emplacements, protective walls, and firing slits. Cobra defensive battle station with single-operator positions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Ferret ATV (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue four-wheeled Cobra recon ATV with forward-mounted weapons and compact chassis. Small single-rider all-terrain reconnaissance vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Flight Pod (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Blue spherical one-man enclosed flight pod with a transparent bubble canopy, twin side-mounted guns, and small thruster engines. Also known as the Trouble Bubble.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra Moray Hydrofoil (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dark blue armed attack hydrofoil with retractable foils, twin torpedo launchers, deck-mounted machine guns, and an enclosed pilot cabin. Cobra's primary naval assault vessel.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra Night Landing (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue small inflatable assault raft with outboard motor, mounted weapon, and low profile for covert beach landing operations. Seats two to three figures.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Hydro-Sled (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Blue one-man water sled with handlebars, torpedo tube, and streamlined hull. Compact underwater assault vehicle for aquatic operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Night Raven S3P (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Black supersonic spy plane with twin vertical stabilizers, detachable reconnaissance drone, and an enclosed pilot cockpit. One of the largest Cobra aircraft with a sleek angular silhouette.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra Stun (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Blue twin-cockpit split-wheeled attack vehicle with two elevated side-by-side gunner seats, forward-mounted cannons, and wide-set oversized wheels.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra Surveillance Port (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue electronic surveillance battle station with radar dish, communications arrays, and monitoring equipment. Static intelligence-gathering emplacement.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Terror Drome (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Massive dark blue circular fortress with an integrated Firebat launch pad, defensive gun turrets, command center, and multiple levels of defensive emplacements. Cobra's primary base of operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Dreadnok Air Assault (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Red and black Dreadnok repaint set containing a gyrocopter (Skyhawk repaint) and VTOL aircraft in Dreadnok colors. Sears exclusive two-vehicle air assault package.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Dreadnok Ground Assault (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Red and black Dreadnok repaint set containing a 4WD vehicle (Stinger repaint) and motorcycle (RAM repaint) in Dreadnok colors. Sears exclusive two-vehicle ground package.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Dreadnok Swampfire (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Brown and red pontoon-equipped attack helicopter with floats for water landings, single main rotor, and mounted guns. Dreadnok swamp operations chopper with rugged construction.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Dreadnok Thunder Machine (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Red and rust-colored ramshackle custom hot rod bristling with improvised weapons, spikes, and exhaust pipes. Cobbled-together armored attack car with a chaotic junkyard aesthetic.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Dreadnok Air Skiff (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Brown and red turbine-powered fan boat with twin machine guns, missiles, and a large rear-mounted propeller. Dreadnok aerial skiff for swamp and air operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Buzz Boar (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue small motorized tunneling vehicle with a rotating front saw blade and compact tracked chassis. Underground assault vehicle for surprise attacks.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Jet Pack (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue personal aerial jet pack with twin thruster nozzles, control handles, and compact fuel tanks. One-man flight device worn on the back.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Maggot (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dark blue heavily armed multi-turreted battle tank with dual elevated gun pods on articulated arms, central driver cockpit, and wide treads. Three-crew heavy assault vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra Mamba (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dark blue large attack helicopter with two detachable side-mounted flight pods, central rotor assembly, and heavy forward armament. Multi-component aerial assault craft.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra Pogo Ballistic Battle Ball (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dark blue spherical one-man ballistic assault vehicle with a pogo-bounce mechanism, enclosed cockpit, and forward-mounted weapons. Unconventional hopping mech design.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra Sea Ray (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Dark blue dual-purpose underwater/aerial assault vehicle with surface-to-air missiles, turbojet engine, and streamlined hull. Operates both submerged and airborne.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Cobra W.O.L.F. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: White and blue arctic assault tracked vehicle with a forward-mounted cannon turret, ski runners, and wide treads for snow travel. Cobra's primary cold-weather combat vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Dreadnok Cycle (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Red and black armed attack motorcycle with tall exhaust pipes, side-mounted missiles, and rugged construction. Dreadnok combat cycle with punk aesthetic.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Adder (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue twin-engine fan-powered attack hovercraft with dual rear propellers, forward-mounted guns, and a low-profile hull. Fast assault hovercraft for varied terrain.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Battle Barge (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue small armed assault pontoon boat with mounted weapons and low gunwales. Compact watercraft for river and coastal attack operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra B.U.G.G. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue amphibious command vehicle with a detachable two-man hovercraft/submarine module. Multi-role aquatic assault craft with enclosed pilot compartment and weapons stations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Imp (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue small motorized assault vehicle with compact chassis, forward-mounted weapons, and single-rider open cockpit. Lightweight fast-attack ground vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Stellar Stiletto (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark purple and black space-capable attack jet with angular futuristic design, twin engines, and a single-seat cockpit with canopy. Orbital combat fighter.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Gyrocopter (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue small motorized gyrocopter with a single overhead rotor, compact open-frame cockpit, and lightweight construction. Motorized vehicle pack mini-aircraft.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Rocket Sled (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue small motorized rocket-powered sled with rear thruster, handlebar controls, and ski runner base. Compact high-speed ground vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Machine Gun Nest (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue motorized machine gun emplacement with rotating barrel, protective shield, and sandbag-style base. Motorized action pack defensive position.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Twin Missile Radar (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue motorized twin missile launcher with rotating radar dish, dual launch tubes, and compact base platform. Motorized action pack air defense system.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Dreadnok Battle Axe (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Red and black three-wheeled attack motorcycle with motorized action, mounted weapons, and aggressive punk styling. Dreadnok trike for high-speed assault.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Destro's Despoiler (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and gold Iron Grenadiers attack helicopter with a detachable ground tank. Dual-mode vehicle with main rotor, chin gun, and separable armored lower section. Destro's personal command craft.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: D.E.M.O.N. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and gold Iron Grenadiers heavy assault tank with dual elevating cannon turrets, heavy tracked chassis, and angular armored hull. Multi-ordnance neutralizer vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Iron Grenadiers A.G.P. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and gold Iron Grenadiers one-man anti-gravity flight pod with enclosed bubble canopy, side-mounted weapons, and compact thruster engines. Personal hover vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Condor Z25 (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue large modular attack aircraft with a detachable bomber wing section and high-speed fuselage. Features bomb-bay doors, retractable landing gear, and multiple weapons pylons.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra F.A.N.G. II (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue upgraded one-man attack gyrocopter with improved rotor design, enclosed cockpit, and enhanced weaponry. Updated version of the original F.A.N.G.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra H.I.S.S. II (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue redesigned high-speed sentry tank with an upgraded turret, wider treads, and modernized angular armor. Evolution of Cobra's signature battle tank.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Darklon's Evader (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and gold Iron Grenadiers fast-attack ground vehicle with open cockpit, forward-mounted weapons, and sleek low-profile chassis. Darklon's personal assault vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Destro's Razorback (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and gold Iron Grenadiers heavy assault tank with a large main cannon, armored hull, and heavy-duty treads. Frontline armored warfare vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Python Patrol A.S.P. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Red and black Python Patrol repaint of the Cobra A.S.P. with python-pattern camouflage. Twin-cannon artillery platform in distinctive snake-skin color scheme.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Python Patrol Conquest (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Red and black Python Patrol repaint of the Conquest X-30 fighter jet with python-pattern camouflage. Forward-swept-wing jet in distinctive snake-skin color scheme.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Python Patrol Stun (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Red and black Python Patrol repaint of the Cobra Stun with python-pattern camouflage. Twin-cockpit attack vehicle in distinctive snake-skin color scheme.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Hammerhead (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue underwater command vessel with two detachable attack submarines, decompression chamber, and pivoting radar array. Large multi-component naval command vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Piranha (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue high-speed assault speedboat with surface-skimming missiles, depth charge launcher, and streamlined hull. Fast-attack watercraft for naval operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Rage (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue urban assault tank with rear mine dispenser, heavy forward weapons, and angular armored hull. Designed for city combat with anti-personnel capabilities.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Overlord's Dictator (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and gold Iron Grenadiers attack tank/hovercraft with a detachable flying jet pod. Two-in-one vehicle with ground assault and aerial reconnaissance capability.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Destro's Dominator (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and gold Iron Grenadiers transforming vehicle that converts from tracked tank mode to helicopter gunship mode. Dual-configuration assault vehicle with rotors and treads.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Ice Sabre (ARAH Toy)
data.description: White and blue arctic assault carrier with rotating three-man cockpit, anti-aircraft cannons, and swinging missile launcher. Large cold-weather operations vehicle on wide treads.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Paralyzer (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue fast-attack tracked vehicle with a swiveling battle turret, double-barreled concussion cannon, and advanced tread technology. Agile armored assault platform.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Septic Tank (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Purple and green Eco-Warriors anti-environmental assault tank with water-shooting sludge cannon and color-change battle damage feature. Toxic waste-themed combat vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Battle Copter (Interrogator) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue pull-string powered helicopter with functional spinning rotors for actual flight capability. Compact Cobra attack chopper with mounted weapons.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Air Commandos Glider (Sky Creeper) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue Cobra glider aircraft with fixed wings, pull-string launcher mechanism, and single-seat open cockpit. Air Commandos series silent insertion vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Air Commandos Glider (Night Vulture) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue Cobra assault glider with swept wings, pull-string launcher, and open cockpit. Air Commandos series covert recon glider for night operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Barracuda (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue attack submarine with torpedo launchers, movable stabilizer fins, and baking soda-powered real diving action. Streamlined underwater assault vessel.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Earthquake (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue large construction/combat vehicle with earth-moving front blade, heavy weapons, and massive wheels. Dual-purpose engineering and assault vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Liquidator (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue advanced tactical fighter jet with water-shooting capability, four missiles, and swept-wing design. One-piece construction combat aircraft with water action feature.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Parasite (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue armored personnel carrier with bomb-firing catapult, rotating laser chin gun, and capacity for up to 17 figures. Large troop transport with heavy weapons.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Battle Copter (Heli-Viper) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue pull-string powered helicopter with functional spinning rotors. Compact Cobra attack chopper distinct from the 1991 Interrogator version.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Detonator (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Dark blue large ICBM missile launcher vehicle with six monster tires, three long-range rockets on an elevating launch platform, and targeting seat. Battle Corps series heavy ordnance vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Ice Snake (ARAH Toy)
data.description: White and blue fast-attack arctic vehicle with spring-action 360-degree rotating missile launcher, roll-cage canopy, and heavy-duty treads. Battle Corps series cold-weather assault vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Cobra Scorpion (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Tan and brown desert attack vehicle with 360-degree rotating missile launcher, pivoting Gatling gun, and aggressive desert camouflage. Battle Corps series arid-terrain assault vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero
